notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for boundaries between the Pueblo of Santa Clara and the Pueblo de San Ildefonso, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 109–286, § 13120 Stat. 1228Sept. 27, 2006
